briefdescription.para: This macro sets the TPG color format.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the peripheral Instance
is the new color format

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the TPG pattern.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the peripheral Instance
is the new pattern id

briefdescription.para: This macro sets TPG active width.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the peripheral instance whose TPG width is to be set.
The desired width value to set for the TPG.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets TPG active height.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the peripheral Instance
is the new active height

briefdescription.para: This macro sets TPG Interlaced Mode.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the peripheral Instance
is the interlace mode T/F

briefdescription.para: This macro reads GPIO to check video lock status.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the peripheral Instance

briefdescription.para: This function initializes system wide common peripherals.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function resets the Hls IP block(s)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the peripheral instance

briefdescription.para: This function reports system wide common peripherals included in the design.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Subsystem instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function configures TPG to user defined parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the peripheral instance

briefdescription.para: This function configures the Video Timing Controller (VTC) for a given peripheral instance based on the provided video stream parameters and the number of pixels per clock.

detaileddescription.para:
The function performs the following steps:
Disables and resets the VTC generator.
Sets the source selection to use generator registers for all timing parameters.
Manually writes to the VTC control register to handle the interlace field workaround.
Populates the XVtc_Timing structure with horizontal and vertical timing values from the provided video stream, adjusting horizontal counts by the PixPerClk value.
Applies a workaround for known VTC offset issues by adjusting vertical porch values.
Sets the polarity of all VTC outputs according to the video stream timing.
Enables the VTC generator and updates the register configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPeriph instance to configure.
Pointer to the XVidC_VideoStream structure containing timing information.
Number of pixels processed per clock cycle.
is a pointer to the peripheral instance

memberdef.argsstring: (XPeriph *InstancePtr, u16 width, u16 height, XVidC_ColorFormat Cformat, u16 Pattern, u16 IsInterlaced)
memberdef.name: XPeriph_SetTpgParams

briefdescription.para: This function sets the parameters for the Test Pattern Generator (TPG) in the XPeriph instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPeriph instance.
Width of the test pattern to be generated.
Height of the test pattern to be generated.
Color format for the test pattern (of type XVidC_ColorFormat).
Pattern type to be generated.
Flag indicating whether the output should be interlaced (1) or progressive (0).
is a pointer to the peripheral instance
